headline: Quantization broke out this month as inference-efficiency work converged with Claude's enterprise deployment push.
body: Quantization is the leading mover and a breakout, anchored by NVIDIA's near real-time video diffusion on Blackwell B200, which combined dynamic quantization, latent chunk caching, and step distillation to cut the 50-step denoising process to as few as one step. Claude advanced in parallel across regulated enterprise: large banks deployed it organization-wide via Anthropic's financial services event, and AWS Bedrock added Claude Code with data residency, prompt caching, cross-region inference, and content guardrails. Content moderation and throughput held the top rotation positions, reflecting the same operational and compliance focus. Multi-agent tooling also surfaced through Google's Agent Development Kit work on long-running, event-driven agents.
